---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this solve? What's frustrating about the current experience?

## Proposed solution
How should this work? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered
What other approaches did you think about?

## Additional context
Screenshots, links, or other context.
